name: Cranberry Fruit Nut Bread
recipeInstructions: Preheat oven to 350°F. Generously grease and lightly flour a 9x5x3 inch loaf pan (I used a nonstick pan). Prepare cranberries, nuts, and orange peel. Set aside. In a bowl mix together flour, sugar, baking powder, salt, and soda. Cut in shortening. Stir in orange juice, egg, and orange peel mixing just to moisten. Fold in cranberries and nuts. Spoon into prepared pan. Bake 60 minutes or until wooden pick inserted into center comes out clean. Cool on a rack for 15 minutes. Remove from pan, cool completely. Wrap and store overnight. Makes 1 loaf.
